com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless

Interface M0Card

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Card, ContactlessCard
    Deprecated. 
    Replaced by "MifareUltraLightCard" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.

    public interface M0Card
extends ContactlessCard
    Provides M0 card operations.

    Note:This module is deprecated, if you want to perform mifare related interfaces, please use Newland RFIC module instead.

    How to create a M0Card instance:

         M1Card m1Card = new M0CardImpl()

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void authenticate(byte[] key)
      Deprecated. 
      Replaced by "MifareUltraLightCard.authenticate()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
      byte[] readBlockData(byte blockNo)
      Deprecated. 
      Replaced by "MifareUltraLightCard.read()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
      void writeBlockData(byte blockNo, byte[] data)
      Deprecated. 
      Replaced by "MifareUltraLightCard.write()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.card.contactless.ContactlessCard

        activate, deactivate

    • Method Detail

      • authenticate

        void authenticate(byte[] key)
           throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. Replaced by "MifareUltraLightCard.authenticate()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
        Authenticates M0 card after the card is activated and before reading/writing the card.
        Parameters:
        key - [Required] Authentication key, the key is 16 bytes.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • readBlockData

        byte[] readBlockData(byte blockNo)
              throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. Replaced by "MifareUltraLightCard.read()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
        Reads data from the specified block of M0 card.
        Parameters:
        blockNo - [Required] Block index, value range: [0-255].
        Returns:
        Data of the block, 16 bytes.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • writeBlockData

        void writeBlockData(byte blockNo,
                    byte[] data)
             throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. Replaced by "MifareUltraLightCard.write()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
        Writes data to the specified block of M0 card.

        Example:

             int blockNo = 4;
     byte[] data = new byte[]{0x01, 0x02, 0x03, 0x04};
     try{
         m1Card.writeBlockData(blockNo, data);
     } catch(NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the exception.
     }
        Parameters:
        blockNo - [Required] Block index, value range: [0-255].
        data - [Required] Data to write. Data length can be 4 or 16, but actually only 4 bytes will be taken.
        Throws:
        NSDKException
